---
title: "NosAnalizamos"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-04"
---

```{r}
if (!require(pacman)) install.packages("pacman")

pacman::p_load(
  readr,
  tidyverse,
  dplyr,
  lubridate,
  hms,
  knitr,
  float,
  kableExtra,
)

```

```{r}
library(readr)
library()
datos = read_table("data/NosAutoanalizamos2022 - Hoja1.tsv", 
    skip = 25)
datos = datos[2:63,]


```
